Combat sport events in 2022
ONE on Prime Video 5: de Ridder vs. Malykhin
The poster for ONE on Prime Video 5: de Ridder vs. Malykhin
PromotionONE Championship
DateDecember 3, 2022 (2022-12-03)
VenueSM Mall of Asia Arena
CityPasay, Philippines
Event chronology
ONE 163: Akimoto vs. Petchtanong ONE on Prime Video 5: de Ridder vs. Malykhin ONE 164: Pacio vs. Brooks

ONE on Prime Video 5: de Ridder vs. Malykhin (also known as ONE Fight Night 5) was a Combat sport event produced by ONE Championship. It that took place on December 3, 2022, at the SM Mall of Asia Arena in Pasay, Philippines.[1][2][3]

Background

[edit]

The event competition was announced couple from live ONE on Prime Video 2 by a welterweight bout between former KSW Welterweight and Middleweight Champion Roberto Soldić and undefeated contender Murad Ramazanov.[1]

A ONE Light Heavyweight World Championship bout between current champion Reinier de Ridder (also current ONE Middleweight World Champion) and current interim ONE Heavyweight champion Anatoly Malykhin headlined the event.[4][5]

A ONE Featherweight Kickboxing World Championship bout between current champion Superbon Singha Mawynn and former K-1 Super Welterweight Champion (also 2022 ONE Featherweight Kickboxing World Grand Prix Champion) Chingiz Allazov was expected to take place at the event.[6] The pairing was previously scheduled to co-main event at ONE on Prime Video 2, but Allazov forced to withdraw from the event due to an injury.[7][8] In turn, Superbon forced to withdraw due to came down with an illness and the bout was moved to headline at ONE on Prime Video 6 on January 14, 2023.[9]

A ONE Women's Atomweight Muay Thai World Championship unification bout between current champion Allycia Rodrigues and interim champion Janet Todd was expected to take place at the event.[10] However on November 30, Todd pulled out from the event due to tests positive for COVID-19 and the bout was postponed.[11][12]

A ONE Lightweight Submission Grappling World Championship bout between current champion Kade Ruotolo (also the 2022 ADCC World Championship 77kg gold medalist) and promotional newcomer Matheus Gabriel that took place the event.[13]

At the weigh-ins, Jackie Buntan fails hydration four times and must negotiate a catchweight; she weighed in at 130 pounds, 5 pounds over the strawweight limit. The bout proceeded at catchweight with Buntan being fined 20% of his purse, which went to his opponent Amber Kitchen.[14]

Results

[edit]
Main card (Amazon Prime Video)
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Light Heavyweight Anatoly Malykhin def. Reinier de Ridder (c) KO (punches) 1 4:35 [a]
Lightweight Submission Grappling Kade Ruotolo (c) def. Matheus Gabriel Decision (unanimous) 1 10:00 [b]
Welterweight Roberto Soldić vs. Murad Ramazanov No Contest (accidental knee to groin) 1 3:01 [c]
Catchweight (130 lbs) Muay Thai Jackie Buntan def. Amber Kitchen Decision (unanimous) 3 3:00 [d]
Lightweight Lowen Tynanes def. Park Dae-sung Decision (split) 3 5:00
Lead card (YouTube / Watch ONE)
Lightweight Edson Marques def. Eduard Folayang TKO (punches) 2 2:53
Catchweight (180 lbs) Submission Grappling Tye Ruotolo def. Marat Gafurov Submission (triangle armbar) 1 5:09
Heavyweight Oumar Kane def. Jasur Mirzamukhamedov Decision (unanimous) 3 5:00
Women's Atomweight Denice Zamboanga def. Lin Heqin Decision (split) 3 5:00
  1. ^ For the ONE Light Heavyweight World Championship.
  2. ^ For the ONE Lightweight Submission Grappling World Championship.
  3. ^ Accidental knee to the groin rendered Soldić unable to continue.
  4. ^ Buntan missed weight (130 lbs).

[15]

Bonus awards

[edit]

The following fighters were awarded bonuses:[16]

  • Performance of the Night ($100,000): Anatoly Malykhin
  • Performance of the Night ($50,000): Edson Marques and Tye Ruotolo
